query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO authed_tokens
                       (id, token, origin_ip, reduced_origin_ip, asn_num, writing_ua, authed_ua,
                        auth_code, created_at, authed_at, validity, last_wrote_at,
                        author_id_seed, additional_info)
                       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1, ?, ?, ?)
